wikitext.*:
===Pokémon===
====As the protagonist====
As the player character, Calem can have up to all 721 Pokémon available in the Kalos games. As an NPC, he uses a selection of Pokémon through out the story to battle the player, including usage of [[Mega Evolution]].
Calem is required to pick between {{p|Chespin}}, {{p|Fennekin}} or {{p|Froakie}} as his first partner Pokémon. As the player, he will choose the Pokémon first, as NPC, Calem will pick the first partner Pokémon with the type advantage over the player.

As the player, he is also required to catch either {{p|Xerneas}}{{sup/6|X}} or {{p|Yveltal}}{{sup/6|Y}}.

=====Required in story=====
;First partner Pokémon
[[Tierno]] will offer Calem one of these three Pokémon at the start of the game under [[Professor Sycamore]], both as a player character and NPC.

;Legendary Pokémon
As the player, he is required to catch either {{p|Xerneas}}{{sup/6|X}} or {{p|Yveltal}}{{sup/6|Y}} in the [[Team Flare Secret HQ]] after it awakens to be used for the [[ultimate weapon]]. The player will then be asked if they would like to use the [[Legendary Pokémon]] to fight against Lysandre.
